## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Feb 19, 2026 - Jun 16, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Caruni Fernandes_, Feb 19, 2026, 2/5: "App is buggy. I tested it and it doesn't work in any way. I don't find it all that practical. Then I wanted to delete my account again, but the app doesn't allow that. Either a mistake or intentional so that they can show more accounts? After entering the password as a security measure, it says that the password would be incorrect. So reset the password and assign a new password. Wrong password again!!!"
            2. _Ayush Mishra_, Jun 16, 2026, 5/5: "After the latest update the reminders doesn't get re-schedule on running the "Moment" as it used to before the update. Even if you select a particular time (on same day only), the reminder won't be changed accordingly (can check after moment) nor it would trigger. Please rectify the bug."
